posts.author: Jimmypenguin (Jimmy Lovett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way anyone knows of to hide columns only in certain views of a board?
For example, we want to share a board that is frequently updated with staff members who are not on Monday, but they only need to see certain columns and we would like to hide the others to keep things simple. However, other staff members need to see all the columns within Monday. Because the board changes almost daily, making a copy of it isn’t an option.
Any ideas?
Thanks!
